name: BookEngineer
description: Customer wants to book, arrange, or schedule an engineer or technician to visit their home — for installation, repair, or setup. The customer is requesting a new visit, not rescheduling an existing one, confirming an existing appointment, or reporting a fault.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I need to book an engineer visit
Can I arrange for an engineer to come to my home?
Book an engineer for a {bookEngineerVisitType} please
I need an engineer to look at my {bookEngineerProductType}
How do I book a technician visit?
Schedule an engineer for my {bookEngineerProductType} {bookEngineerVisitType}
I'd like to arrange an {bookEngineerVisitType} visit
Can you send an engineer to {bookEngineerVisitType} my {bookEngineerProductType} ?
I need someone to come out and set up my {bookEngineerProductType}
Book a home visit for my {bookEngineerProductType}
I want an engineer to come and {bookEngineerVisitType} my {bookEngineerProductType}
How soon can I get an engineer out?
I need a technician to {bookEngineerVisitType} my {bookEngineerProductType} as soon as possible
Is there an engineer available this week?
I've been told I need an engineer visit for my {bookEngineerProductType}
Can I get an engineer booked for my {bookEngineerProductType} ?
I want to book an {bookEngineerVisitType} for my new broadband
I need an engineer — the self-install didn't work
